review_text:
I just went to get my eyebrow done by Erin she was great and very understaning and eased all my fears and answered all my 50 million questions about medical concerns, how clean the faclitiy was, years of experience, and her licences explaining the types of metal etc... I was afraid to get another piercing again because the other one rejected.  But I got it done and Erin was wonderful doing the piercing it was easy quick a d simple, I expressed the fact of not wanting to feel any pain and two types of numbings were offered and being a chicken yes I got numbed up. I looked all around at tattoo places and although they got good reviews I was skepticalanf then I found Inkstheticare a medical environment everything was super clean and enviting! When talking to the owner Dr. Carlos he was professional and very upbeat and also answered all my concerns and was upfront with all the medical questions with confidence and between the both of them I definanlty know I made the right decision coming here. Anyone looking to get a piercing or tatoo come here you wont be disappointed!!!
THANK YOU FOR EVERYTHING ERIN AND CARLOS!!!!
VERY HAPPY WITH RESULTS😊😊😊😊😊😊😊

review_text:
Inkstheticare is one of the cleanest environments I've ever been in. I almost forgot I was getting a piercing and not a check up or something from a doctor. Getting a piercing in a professional, clinical environment is practically priceless, and Erin was the perfect piercer! She was friendly, welcoming,  and beyond professional making me feel so comfortable to get my first dermal. This place would be perfect to take your little ones for their first ear piercings, and especially if you're thinking about more serious piercings like dermals. Erin is your go to girl!
-Rily Scaife (no google acount)
